design_note: Dungeon level identity should follow available Oryx creature/environment assets. Enemy lists are intentionally incomplete until mapper curation catches up.

progression.notes: Early human faction space; good tutorial biome for readable melee and simple support units.
Third creature row appears to contain the likely sand-bandit and centurion set.
Should push heavier damage, burn, armor, and volcanic/stone encounter texture.
A late mid-game tactical biome with high DEX enemies, guards, and elite formations.
Final destination identity; should lean into attrition, revive/curse flavor, and boss pressure.

future_paths.intent: Eventually allow multiple routes to the final dungeon/jail through alternate biome chains with different enemy pools and loot textures.
future_paths.example_shape: forest -> sand or stone_volcanic -> castle -> dungeon_jail
